text: T minus 30 seconds and counting. Standing by for terminal count. Attention, for the count final. 10, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, unité, top. And we have engine start. And liftoff. LJP, décollage. Décollage, liftoff. From a tropical rainforest to the edge of time itself, James Webb begins a voyage back to the birth of the universe. Punching a hole through the clouds, 20 seconds into the flight, good pitch program reported. Trajectoire nominale. Vehicle performance is nominal. The Ariane 5 rocket continues to fly uphill in nominal fashion.
